tool.name: secrets_extractor
tool.description: Extract and detect secrets from various sources including files, git history, and Docker configs.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Scan files and directories for hardcoded secrets - Search git history for accidentally committed secrets - Extract secrets from environment variables - Analyze Docker configurations and images for exposed secrets - Detect API keys, tokens, passwords, and private keys

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The extraction action to perform: - scan_files: Scan files/directories for secrets patterns - scan_git_history: Search git history for leaked secrets - scan_env_vars: Check environment variables for secrets - scan_docker: Analyze Docker configs for exposed secrets - full_scan: Run all scanning methods on a directory

parameter.name: path
parameter.description: Path to file or directory to scan. Required for scan_files, scan_git_history, scan_docker.

parameter.name: patterns
parameter.description: Custom regex patterns to search for (comma-separated). Added to default patterns.

parameter.name: depth
parameter.description: For git history: number of commits to search (default: 100)

returns.description: Extracted secrets with type, location, and redacted values

tool.examples:
# Scan directory for secrets
scan_files ./src
# Search git history for leaked secrets
scan_git_history . 50
# Scan environment variables
scan_env_vars
# Full scan of a directory
full_scan . node_modules/*,*.min.js
